project_ref.name: Jiangxi Province Le'an County Forest Farm Carbon Sink Projec

fields.description: Afforestation, Reforestation, or Revegetation project. Archetype quality depends on species (native vs. monoculture), tenure security, and whether the planting is commercial timber. VM0047 is the current best-in-class methodology.
claims: Net tree-cover increase on degraded land
fields.monitoring_approach: Allometric biomass estimation on permanent sample plots + remote sensing.
